text: Variational Autoencoders (Kingma & Welling 2014) learn a probabilistic latent space by maximizing the Evidence Lower Bound (ELBO), enabling both reconstruction and generation from continuous latent representations.
Hinton & Salakhutdinov (2006, Science) demonstrated that deep autoencoders could learn low-dimensional representations by pretraining layer by layer, sparking the deep learning renaissance.
Denoising autoencoders (Vincent et al. 2008) learn robust representations by reconstructing clean inputs from corrupted versions, forcing the model to capture the underlying data manifold.
